meta.name: description
meta.content: Learn about DocSendGo and its QR-based file sharing platform

article.p: DocSendGo is a simple file-sharing and document productivity platform built for everyone—students, offices, families, CSC centres, print shops and businesses.
Each user can create one personal profile and QR code. A sender scans the receiver’s QR code, selects a file and sends it directly to the receiver’s dashboard.

ul.li: Send and receive files using a personal QR code.
View, print and download received documents.
Use PDF and image tools from mobile or desktop.
Install DocSendGo as a Progressive Web App.

article.p: Our goal is to make document transfer fast, clear and accessible without depending on USB drives or complicated sharing steps.
